From: "John Amerling" <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
Subject: Fish Hawk
Date: Fri, 07 Dec 2007 14:12:51 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

April Newland and I spoke after you and I spoke yesterday. She confirmed
the following about the situation:

 

1.       The owner is willing to take payments over time provided that Maria
Hodge is satisfied with the security arrangements

2.       The list price has been lowered to $1,500,000.

 

April said that the owner would take list price, $1,500,000, $ 800,000 down,
balance over three years. 

 

I told her that I could not recommend to you nor would I expect you to make
an an offer at list price, ditto on the issue of offering the amount of our
previous full price offer as the down payment for any proposal to pay over
time.

 

We are now beginning to see movement after many months. We should discuss
what we might counter with. 

 

Lafayette Contractors, LLC

6100 Red Hook Quarters, Suite A2-7

St. Thomas, VI 00802

340 779-8054 (O)

340 779-8055 (FAX)

340 690-7194 (Cell)

From:John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
Subject:Fish Hawk
Date:Fri, 07 Dec 2007 14:12:51 GMT
To:DKIESQ@aol.com

April Newland and I spoke after you and I spoke yesterday. She confirmed  the following about the situation:

 

1.       The owner is willing to take payments over time provided that Maria Hodge is satisfied with the security arrangements

2.       The list price has been lowered to $1,500,000.

 

April said that the owner would take list price, $1,500,000, $ 800,000 down, balance over three years.

 

I told her that I could not recommend to you nor would I expect you to make an an offer at list price, ditto on the issue of offering the amount of our previous full price offer as the down payment for any proposal to pay over time.

 

We are now beginning to see movement after many months. We should discuss what we might counter with.
